user_query:
I need to deliver a small PyQt4-based todo list prototype for my class. Please complete the data model, get the unit tests passing, validate the CLI export, and prepare concise meeting notes. Work in the workspace root.

What to do:
1) Implement the functions in app/model.py so that tests in tests/test_model.py pass using the provided data/tasks.json. The model must: load and validate tasks, support filtering, compute simple stats, and export to CSV with a fixed header.
2) Run the unit tests before making changes to capture the failures, then after your fixes to verify green tests. Save the full stdout of both runs to:
   - artifacts/test_results_before.txt (first run, expected to include failures)
   - artifacts/test_results_after.txt (post-fix run, expected to show all tests passing)
   Use: python -m unittest -v > artifacts/test_results_before.txt 2>&1 and then again after fixes to artifacts/test_results_after.txt.
3) Ensure app/app.py supports a CLI validation path that does not require a GUI: running python app/app.py --export artifacts/export.csv must load data/tasks.json via the model and write a CSV with header id,title,status,priority and exactly 6 rows of data. Print a short success message including the row count on completion.
4) Analyze the failing test output from artifacts/test_results_before.txt to identify the root causes. Prepare docs/meeting_notes.md with:
   - Summary (1–3 sentences of the prototype state)
   - Failures observed (bullet list citing the failing unittest method names exactly as shown in the before output and a brief reason)
   - Fixes made (mapping fixes to failures)
   - Test results (counts of tests run, passed, failed, after the fix)
   - Next actions (3–5 concrete action items for the next iteration)

Constraints and checks:
- Do not remove or rename the existing test or data files. You may edit app/model.py and app/app.py and add any small helper functions inside the model as needed.
- The unit tests must be runnable with only the standard library (no third-party packages). GUI display is optional and should not be required to complete the task.
- The CSV written by the export command should be reproducible from data/tasks.json via the model.export_csv implementation and must include the header in that exact field order.

Deliverables to verify:
- Passing unit tests recorded in artifacts/test_results_after.txt
- CLI export at artifacts/export.csv
- Meeting notes at docs/meeting_notes.md reflecting your analysis of the initial failures and fixes. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
